# Milestone 5 version 1.0.1B - January 18th 2021

## M5V1.0.1B

### About

This is the fourth public release of the Jewels (Android Game) image folder for the SeanPM Life Archive project. This release contains data from September 10th 2020 to January 17th 2021.

This is the 2021 End of Life update (part 2) as the current device I play this game on had its last straw on function loss (the power button) I intend to play this game again in the future.

This release includes:

> * Images from September 10th 2020 to January 17th 2021

> * A Project Wiki

> * Basic documentation

> * No other content included in this release

Changes in this release:

> * Deleted 16 `IGNORE.md` files

> * Added release notes for version 3

> * No other changes in this release
